hud.player2.authorized: Player2 authorized. Local Insight is now active.
hud.newspaper.publish_rumor: {{source}} spread a rumor. Check today's newspaper.
rumor_board.title: Town Request Board
rumor_board.detail.default: Select a request to view details.
rumor_board.detail.searching: Searching the board for new requests...
rumor_board.detail.daily_cap: No new posting right now. Check back tomorrow.
rumor_board.detail.none_available: No one has a new posting right now.
rumor_board.detail.none_created: No posting was added from that reply.
rumor_board.status.refresh_requires_acti: Select an active request to refresh completion progress.
rumor_board.status.refresh_missing: That request is no longer active.
market_board.title: Town Market Board
market_board.subtitle: {{date}} - Price: Free
market_board.cause.event.market_up: Cause: market buzz pushed prices up.
market_board.cause.event.market_down: Cause: market buzz pushed prices down.
newspaper.title: The Valley Times
newspaper.subtitle: Vol. 1 - {{date}} - Price: Free
gmcm.option.enable_player_chat_menu.name: Enable Player Chat Menu
gmcm.option.enable_player_chat_menu.tool: Enable in-world NPC chat menu follow-ups. Disable to keep NPC interactions vanilla-only.
Show the top-left Player2 status badge and click-to-connect button.
gmcm.option.mode.name: Simulation Mode
gmcm.option.mode.tooltip: Select world simulation intensity: cozy_canon (gentle), story_depth (stronger consequences), living_chaos (high volatility).
gmcm.option.price_floor_pct.name: Price Floor %
gmcm.option.price_floor_pct.tooltip: Minimum crop price as a fraction of base price. Example: 0.80 means 80% floor.
gmcm.option.price_ceiling_pct.name: Price Ceiling %
gmcm.option.price_ceiling_pct.tooltip: Maximum crop price as a fraction of base price. Example: 1.40 means 140% ceiling.
gmcm.option.daily_price_delta_cap_pct.to: Maximum single-day price movement as a fraction of current price. Example: 0.10 means +/-10% per day.
gmcm.option.open_board_key.name: Open Market Board Key
gmcm.option.open_board_key.tooltip: Keybind to open the Market Board.
gmcm.option.open_newspaper_key.name: Open Newspaper Key
gmcm.option.open_newspaper_key.tooltip: Keybind to open the daily Newspaper.
gmcm.option.open_rumor_board_key.name: Open Rumor Board Key
gmcm.option.open_rumor_board_key.tooltip: Keybind to open the Rumor Board.
